--- Main Page ---
Norcross Brewery - Social Fox Brewing & Distillery | Norcross | Peachtree Corners
Skip to content
Norcross Brewery
admin
2024-12-02T12:30:54-05:00
Small,
Social
&
Local
NOW OPEN 7 DAYS A WEEK!
Located in the heart of historic downtown Norcross, Social Fox Brewing & Distillery is a neighborhood brewery and spirits bar built for people who still want to go out — just without the fuss.
We craft approachable, flavorful beers alongside easy-drinking cocktails and house spirits, creating a space where beer lovers, non-beer drinkers, and everyone in between can find something they enjoy. Whether you’re here for a flagship IPA, a light and social beer, a vodka soda, or a bourbon pour, Social Fox is designed for relaxed hangs, familiar faces, and nights that feel worth it.
You’ll find a rotating tap wall of craft beer, a full lineup of spirits, and plenty of options for guests looking for gluten-reduced, gluten-free, or lower-commitment drinks. Our taproom is a place to settle in — for trivia nights, casual meetups, family-friendly afternoons, or just an easy night out close to home.
Drinks & To-Go Section
At Social Fox, flexibility matters. That’s why we offer:
-A tap wall of craft beer, including gluten-reduced options
-Vodka cocktails, Fox Paw Hard Seltzers, Twisted Tail Sweet Tea, and SF Spiked Lemonade
-Fox Creek Bourbon and other Social Fox spirits
-Retail bottles of vodka and bourbon
-4-packs and 6-packs of canned beer to go
You can also find select Social Fox beers in cans and kegs throughout Gwinnett County and across Georgia.
From your first visit to your fiftieth, Social Fox is a place where the drinks are good, the vibe is welcoming, and you’re always invited to stay a little longer.
💙 Be a Friend to the Fox
Venmo
Social Fox was built by people who believe in independent craft, local gathering spaces, and doing things the right way—even when it’s harder.
If you love what we’re building and want to support future beers, spirits, events, food pop-ups, live music, and community projects, this is a simple way to contribute directly to Social Fox.
No pressure. No obligation. Just a way to be part of the journey.
Good Day Atlanta
Norcross Georgia’s First Craft Brewery
puts the ‘Social’ in social distancing
Learn More
Socialite Club
Want to become a founding member and support Norcross Georgia’s First Craft Brewery? Socialites receive exclusive updates, events, special perks, discounts and more!
Join Today
Our Beer
Come grab a pint, flight, growler or 16 oz cans poured fresh from the taps! Swing by our taproom and try some of our core beers and limited releases.
Learn More
Social Fox Swag
Check out our Social Fox Gear! We have a selection of high quality, fashionable t-shirts, work shirts, hoodies, trucker hats, fitted hats, stickers and more.
Buy Merch
Let’s Get Social
Grab a plastic pint and walk around downtown Norcross. Grab a cocktail, retail vodka or bourbon bottles, 16 oz cans or 12oz cans to go! Or sit and enjoy the vibe of our taproom and relax over a few drinks, pints, or a flight.
Visit Us
Find the Fox
Look for our beer in 12oz 6 packs throughout the Georgia Market! Hand crafted and canned at Social Fox Brewing, Norcross, GA!
Distributed by Georgia Crown.

We are located in beautiful,
DOWNTOWN
HISTORIC
NORCROSS
Imagine a place where new ideas are born, nurtured and brought to life. Imagine a place where all members of the community shape the culture, unique personalities are recognized and similarities are celebrated. Imagine a place where innovative business ideas can take root and flourish and imaginative new residents can plug in and feel at home. All of this and more can be found in Norcross…a place to imagine.

Tuesday 5-9pm

FREE Parking
There are two parking lots across the street from the brewery
Street parking is available all along South Peachtree Street.
The city offers public parking across the intersection of Skin Alley and Jones Bridge.
There is additional public parking at City Hall.

meta.meta_description: The first award winning Norcross brewery located in the historic downtown area with 18 taps of craft beer, hard seltzers, beermosas, beer slushies, wine-beer hybrids, gluten reduced beer and gluten free options with hard seltzers, hard tea and spiked lemonade all hand crafted on site.
